Meeting: Q4 Portfolio Review
Date: December 15, 2025
Advisor: Sarah Mitchell
Clients: David and Maria Gonzalez

Summary:
David (age 62) is planning to retire in 2027. Current 401k balance is approximately 1,200,000 with Fidelity. Maria (age 59) will continue working until age 65.

Their combined portfolio is approximately 2,400,000:
- 401k (David): 1,200,000
- IRA (Maria): 450,000
- Joint brokerage: 550,000 (at Schwab, acct ending in 7823)
- Cash/savings: 200,000

Action items:
1. Model Roth conversion ladder starting 2026 — convert 80,000/year through 2031 to stay in 24% bracket
2. Rebalance joint account — currently 72% equities, target 60/40
3. Review beneficiary designations on all accounts
4. David should apply for Medicare Part B by March 2027
5. Call Maria at (215) 555-3456 or maria.gonzalez@email.com to schedule follow-up
6. Social Security analysis — David eligible for 3,200/month at age 67

Address on file: 88 Willow Drive, Ardmore PA 19003
